series_metadata.series_title: TAXABLE REAL PROPERTY ABSTRACT, DTE FORM 93
series_metadata.series_description: An abstract, or summary, of each countys taxable real property, filed annually with the Ohio Department of Taxation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: This abstract to be maintained for 10 years with the Ohio Department of Taxation. After 10 years the abstract is to be sent to the Ohio Historical Society., Paper: Archives
